## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why it belongs in PCBHelper.

## Verification

- [ ] Core tests pass
- [ ] Contract tests pass
- [ ] Relevant KiCad/ngspice E2E passes
- [ ] Dry-run/transaction/restore behavior is covered
- [ ] Public-tree privacy scan passes
- [ ] Documentation is updated

## Safety

- [ ] No private PCB files, generated outputs, credentials, or personal paths
- [ ] No raw command or arbitrary file mutation surface
